summary: Tested modifier-related bug fixes in POS system. All three reported bugs are confirmed fixed: 1) Required modifier validation working - prevents adding products without selecting required options, 2) Modifier option prices are independent - each option maintains its own price, 3) Modifiers display correctly with individual prices in both cart and kitchen views.
passed_tests: Required modifier validation - Dialog stays open when clicking AGREGAR without selecting required options
Required modifier validation - Toast error message shown: 'Debes seleccionar una opción para [group name]'
Modifier prices independent - Poco cocido shows +RD$ 50.00, Extra aguacate shows +RD$ 60.00
Cart visualization - Shows modifiers with individual prices (+ Poco cocido +RD$ 50.00, + Extra aguacate +RD$ 60.00)
Kitchen visualization - Shows modifiers with prices (Poco cocido (+$50), Extra aguacate (+$60))
Settings > Modificadores - Edit dialog shows each option with independent price field
Settings > Modificadores - Unique IDs generated for options when editing (prevents state bugs)
Product total calculation - Correctly sums base price + modifier prices (650 + 50 + 60 = 760)
seed_data_creation: Used existing product 'Churrasco' with required modifier groups 'Punto de Cocción' and 'Extras'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modifier functionality fully working. Churrasco product has two required modifier groups for testing. Admin PIN: 0000, Waiter PIN: 1234. Kitchen view accessible via sidebar 'Cocina' link.

required_modifier_validation.behavior: Validates required groups before adding item, shows toast error if missing

independent_option_prices.behavior: Each option has unique ID, prices stored independently

cart_modifier_display.behavior: Shows each modifier on separate line with individual price

kitchen_modifier_display.behavior: Shows modifier name with price in parentheses
